.status-bar.background: rgb(21, 22, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(31, 33, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(21, 22, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(21, 22, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(21, 22, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.background: rgb(62, 67, 93) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(5, 6, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(5, 6, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(41, 44, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(41, 44, 62) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
